mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM supplier WHERE status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier (code, name, contact, phone, address, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET code=#{code}, name=#{name}, contact=#{contact}, phone=#{phone}, address=#{address} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE supplier SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
